basic_details.job_title: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT) has published the Young Professional Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Young Professional positions on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding a Master's Degree in Economics (preferably with International Trade), LLM/ LLB with a PG Diploma in a legal subject, MBA or equivalent from a NIRF-ranked institution, Master's in Public Policy/ International Trade, B.Tech./ B.E., MCA, or a Master's in Data Science, Data Analytics, or Computational Mathematics are eligible to apply online on or before 30 July 2026. Cand

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Economics (preferably with International Trade), LLM/ LLB and PG Diploma in any legal subject, MBA or equivalent from NIRF ranked institution up to 100/ Masters in Public Policy/International Trade, B Tech/ B.E./ MCA/ Masters in Data Science or Data Analytics or Computational Mathematics
qualification.details: Young Professional (YP): Economics: Master's Degree in Economics (preferably with International Trade) Legal: LLM/LLB and PG Diploma in any legal subject. General Management: MBA or equivalent from an institution having NIRF ranking up to 100 in Management category as per the latest NIRF ranking/ Masters in Public Policy/ International Trade. Data Science: B Tech/B.E. in any discipline/MCA/Masters in Data Science or Data Analytics or Computational Mathematics. Minimum one year post qualification experience in relevant field with proficiency in Computer skills.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.directorate_general_of_foreign_trade_dgf: Master's Degree in Economics (preferably with International Trade), LLM/ LLB and PG Diploma in any legal subject, MBA or equivalent from NIRF ranked institution up to 100/ Masters in Public Policy/International Trade, B Tech/ B.E./ MCA/ Masters in Data Science or Data Analytics or Computational Mathematics

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DGFT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DGFT Young Professional Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Young Professional (YP): Economics: Master's Degree in Economics (preferably with International Trade) Legal: LLM/LLB and PG Diploma in any legal subject. General Management: MBA or equivalent from an institution having NIRF ranking up to 100 in Management category as per the latest NIRF ranking/ Masters in Public Policy/ International Trade. Data Science: B Tech/B.E. in any discipline/MCA/Masters in Data Science or Data Analytics or Computational Mathematics. Minimum one year post qualification experience in relevant field with proficiency in Computer skills.

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DGFT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DGFT Young Professional Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment is 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications include a Master's Degree in Economics, LLM/LLB with a PG Diploma in a legal subject, MBA or equivalent from a top-ranked institution, or a Master's in Public Policy/International Trade, or B.Tech/B.E./MCA/Masters in Data Science or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Young Professional post is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, but this is the general upper limit mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Young Professional post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment?
faq.answer: The primary selection process mentioned for the DGFT Young Professional recruitment is Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience, followed by verification of their documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job for Young Professionals at DGFT?
faq.answer: The job for Young Professionals at DGFT is on a contractual basis. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure, as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional post?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, there are 0 vacancies announced for the Young Professional post in this recruitment drive. Candidates should refer to the official notification for any updates or clarifications.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Young Professionals be posted?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for candidates applying in Delhi. The Young Professionals will likely be posted in New Delhi, the city where the Directorate General of Foreign Trade is located.

faq.question: Q10. Does DGFT offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific information regarding age relaxation policies.
